text.title: AI Interview Analysis Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: input → procedure → output report.

input.description: Raw audio / video + Interview script + Speaker labels mapping + Theme taxonomy seed (optional)

trace.step: Run Whisper / Deepgram per file; emit text + word timestamps.
Agent extracts coded snippets per interview with quote anchors.
Cluster + merge into cross-interview themes with occurrence_count.
Sample ≥10 % of themes; mark agree / disagree / revise.
